lyrics_lrc:
[00:00.12]Up, up, UP! High five the sky!
[00:03.60]Up, up, UP! Reach up high!
[00:06.84]Crew on the count of one-two-three,
[00:10.22]High five the sky and high five me!
[00:13.74]Up, up, UP! High five the sky!
[00:17.14]Up, up, UP! Reach up high!
[00:20.30]Slap your palm — boom boom boom!
[00:23.68]Sea Star squad in the room!
[00:27.22]Up, up, UP! High five the sky!
[00:30.68]Up, up, UP! Reach up high!
